# Summary

Briefly describe the change and how it maps to the linked issue.

## Linked Issue

- Closes #<issue-number>

## Acceptance Criteria

Restate the issue acceptance criteria and note how each is satisfied.

- criterion 1
- criterion 2

## Verification

List the commands, checks, and evidence completed for this change.

- command or check 1
- command or check 2

## Risks / Follow-Up

Note any residual risks, deferred work, or assumptions.
